title: Identity resolver (DepMap ID <-> RRID <-> Cell Model Passports) + golden fixtures
context: Models are identified inconsistently across resources; the catalog needs a deterministic resolver that cross-checks DepMap ID, RRID (Cellosaurus CVCL_), and Cell Model Passports ID using RRID as the anchor, reporting conflicts instead of guessing. Standing guardrails bind this task: open-access sources only (no dbGaP/EGA/biobank/controlled-access); COSMIC/OncoKB are link-only; donor fields are published-only with no re-identification or external linkage; every assertion carries field-level provenance; the deliverable is de-identified research metadata, never patient data and never a clinical/therapeutic recommendation.
objective: Build the identity resolver that cross-checks the three ID systems with golden fixtures, including a deliberate conflict that must be flagged.
acceptanceCriteria: Resolves and cross-checks DepMap ID <-> RRID (CVCL_) <-> Cell Model Passports ID using RRID as the anchor; reports unresolved/conflicting mappings rather than guessing.
Ships golden fixtures incl. a deliberate cross-resource conflict that must be flagged; valid triples resolve, malformed RRIDs fail; synthetic/public fixtures only.
Code MIT-licensed; pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint green; no credentials embedded.
resources: ICLAC Register of Misidentified Cell Lines
output: src/resolver/ identity-resolver module plus golden fixtures, green in CI (PR).
